spec_match.rationale: Showcases dynamic scaling over a large cross-section of typical design system components.

interactive.rationale: Features preset buttons and a slider to run real-time compliance checks on multiple component variants.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the feature description and fulfills the objective of auditing multiple components.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers various preset scales and handles no-support gracefully using CSS variables to mock the environment variable behavior.

references.rationale: Missing the required link to the ChromeStatus entry (chromestatus.com/feature/5328467685801984).

design_system.rationale: Excellent use of showcase design tokens and variable overrides.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link to Design System Audit concept page
openQuestions.detail: The concept page is missing the mandatory chromestatus.com/feature/5328467685801984 link in its 'see also' or footer section, which violates repo guidelines.

summary: A comprehensive, beautiful design system audit showcase that evaluates button, input, tab, card, badge, and alert behaviors. It is highly interactive, but suffers from a missing ChromeStatus reference link.
